text: The world here feels clinical and forward-looking, an intersection of technology and human purpose. The glass and ordered lines of the first space evoke a sense of transparent structure, yet there’s a coldness—a distance from the organic. Moving to the second scene, the colorful, bold graphics and the presence of 'R+D' inspire curiosity about progress and our evolving relationship with technology. I feel a mixture of intrigue and caution, conscious of how environments like these shape the future and our place within it.
